steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The colon introduces an explanation: wave power “varies in unpredictable ways.” This reveals what quality wave power lacks.

steps.title: Match the opposite quality
steps.content: ”Consistent” means occurring regularly without variation—what wave power is lacking, since it “varies in unpredictable ways.” The other three choices invoke intentionality, confidence, or cost, none of which relate to the predictability problem described. That matches choice D — D is correct.
